overfitting_fixes_external_test_212_pair.conclusion: No cross-encoder fix beat the calibrated bi-encoder at this data scale

production_model.name: all-mpnet-base-v2 fine-tuned with combined CoSENT + CosineSimilarity loss, + Platt calibration fitted on external calibration split
production_model.calibrator_choice_note: Platt and isotonic are statistically tied on the 106-pair test (delta MAE ~0.002, inside bootstrap noise and run-to-run training variance). Platt ships: a 2-parameter sigmoid cannot overfit a 106-pair calibration split, while isotonic's step function fits the calibration set tighter than it generalizes.

charts.Results/03_final_study_external_eval_fig: Architecture comparison — internal test (Spearman / MAE / speed + scatter plots)
charts.Results/04_overfitting_fixes_fig1.png: Overfitting fixes compared on the 212-pair external test
charts.Results/05_production_v2_fig1.png: Production v2 models on the 106-pair external final test
charts.Results/production_model_comparison_2026: Production v2 rerun (2026-07-07, Colab) — calibrator ordering flipped vs first run, confirming the Platt/isotonic statistical tie
